message:
chore(frankenterm-gui): drop unused GenericImageView import in gpu_regression scaffold

The scaffold was importing `GenericImageView` for an early version
of the dimensions/iter helpers; with the current implementation,
those calls go through `RgbaImage`'s inherent methods so the
trait import is unused and trips an unused-imports warning.

No behavior change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
